summary: Doubt had been cast on a number of claims in the book, including whether he was a survivor of Treblinka , 7 and when Kopisto was shown a wartime photograph of Gray in 1990, he said he had never met Gray during the war, 8 nor had a man resembling the photograph of him ever belonged to their unit: For the first time in my life I saw Martin Gray in a 1945 photo, which was published in March 1990 in Przekrj magazine

title: Insight from https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:Random
